titleStmt.title: SII 22.57: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 57. (A.R. No. 57 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUMAYĀNAM. BRAHMAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBHUVANAVĪRADĒVA (KULŌTTUṄGA III.)—35th YEAR (A.D. 1212-13)

summary.p: The king is introduced with his panegyric “who took Madurai, Īḻam and Karuvūr and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya and performed the anointment of heroes and victors”. The inscription is damaged. It registers a tax-free gift of land at Erukkalandiṭṭai village in Ākkūr by Vāchchiyaṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ Pinnai-ennādāṉ a devotee from Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr a taṉiyūr in Rājādhirājavaḷanāḍu, to provide for the daily supply of a specified number of lotuses to the temple during the several months in the year. The land seems to have been allotted by the temple to three elders of Kuvaḷaiyūr, a hamlet of Tirukkaḍavūr with necessary stipulations.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyu mi
ḻamum karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅkoṇṭu
vira Abhiṣekamum vijaya Abhiṣekamum paṇṇi Aruḷiya
tiripuvaṉaviratevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 5vatu jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ākkūrnāṭṭu Amparṉāṭuṭppa
ṭameviya tirukkaṭavūr Uṭaiyār tirumaiyāṉa muṭai
ya perumāḷ koyil tāṉattom Ivvūrk kuvaḷaiyū
r kiḻavarkaḷil kālakālap pūttoṇṭaṉukkum Uṭai
yāṉicaṉāṉa Irāyaperumāḷ pūttoṇṭaṉukkum
racaṉṉāṉa piṉṉai Eṉṉāta perumāḷ
toṇṭaṉukkum nāṅkaḷ tāṉakkaṭaiyiṭu kuṭutta pa
ricāvatu Innāyaṉāṟkku nittaṟppaṭi ceṅkaḻunir tirup
paḷittāmañ cāttukaikku Ivvūrk kumpiṭṭirukku mā
ṇṭārkaḷil vaṭakarai Irācātarāca vaḷanāṭṭut ta
ṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟam
palamuṭaiyāṉ piṉṉai Eṉṉātāṉ nāyaṉārk
ku viṇṇappañ ceytu Iṟaiyili Iṭuvitta nilam Ākkū
rāṉa Irājentira caturvvetimaṅkalattoṭuṅ kūṭa A
ṭṭi Iṟukkiṟa taṇṭa l Erukkalantiṭṭai nilam 4 10 5
Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭuva
ceṅkaḻuni
riṟ tiruppaḷḷit tāmamākka Oṇṇāte taṅkaḷuk
ku ji kkaivirakalla veṉṟum Innā
yaṉārkku Ākkūrār Ūrkkiḻiṟaiyiliyāka Iṭ
ṭa I m civakāmacuntari viḷākam talainir
Innilattey peṟaveṇume
collukaiyāle śrīcivakāmacun
tariviḷāka meṟkaṭaiya kāla
nilam 1va Itil kuṭiyiruppu puṉ cey
nila til meṭṭil kulaiyun tiṭaruṅ kuḷa
mum maṭap māttāl 2 10 6 Āka Ī40 Aḷa
ke 5tva5ladhā04ṅa nilam 2� ṉāl ba
tva ṉāl Ī4 10 3 ḷ Āka nilam 1tva ṉāl
Uḷppaṭa I3 100 2�
Āka nilam 1va I nilam rālum muppattañcāvatu
taṉakku jivitamāka kaikkoṇṭu nāḷoṉṟukku patakku nel
lukku Iṭum ceṅkaḻuniriṟ tiruppaḷittāmam 5 10 8- Āka Iṭum
ceṅkaḻuniriṟ
ppaḷittāmam Irunūṟṟeṇpatum tiruppūmaṇṭapattukku
mutalāka nāṭoṟum Eṇṇakkaṭavarkaḷaākavum Ippaṭi ceṅ
kaḻuniriṟ tiruppaḷittaāmam nāṭoṟu meṇṇumiṭattu kātti
kaimāsattukku mārkaḻi māsamum tai māsamum Āka māsamu
ṉṟukku nāḷoṉṟukku ceṅkaḻuniriṟ tiruppaḷittāmam 5 10 8
Eṇṇakkaṭavarkaḷāka samum Āṭi māsamum nā
ḷoṉṟukku Irunūṟ
varkaḷākavum Immāsaṅkaḷil
paṅkuṉi cittirai vai[ kāsi] mā
Uḷḷa tiruppaḷittāmam nāḷoṉ
māka vanta tiruppaḷittāman tiru Iṭukiṟa tiruppaḷittāma
Ittiruppaḷittāmam Irunūṟṟeṇpatoṭuṅ kūṭa tiruppū
maṇṭapattey Eṇṇakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ivarkaḷḷukku kuṭi
yiruppāka Iṭṭa maṉai nilam capu Innilaniṉṟa teṅku 3 Itil
mātteṅku Iṟṟaikku muṉ mātteṅku 1 nikki ni

Ivarkaḷ nā
maṭattu mārkaḻi māsattu muṟppatiṉaiñciley Eṇṇakkaṭa
varkaḷākavum ṭaṉampa vaṉākaṉ palluruvilayyaṉ paṭumā
vaitta kkaḷum kaḷe Aṉubhavikka kaṭavatā
kavum Ippaṭiyallatu ciṟappu tirunā ka vilaikoḷḷun tiruppaḷ
ḷittāmaṅkaḷ Ivaṉai Oḻiya puṟamperai vilaikoḷḷakaṭavatākavum Ip
Alla maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa kaṭamai kuṭimaikaḷ kaṭavarkaḷḷallātārā
kavum Innilattāl vanta Uṟai nāḻi Ūrtaṇṭal Uḷḷiṭṭa kaṭamaikaḷum Ākkūri la
ḷappakaṭava kuṭimaikaḷum Ivarkaḷ ceyyakkaṭavarkaḷallātārākavum tāṉakkaṭai
kuṭuttom toṇṭaṉukkum Ippa
ṭikkivai kaiyaṟ kaṇakku kaṭavūruṭaiyāṉ Ātittatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Āt
tiraiyaṉ nampi civatavaṉavāsiyāṉa tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku Ivai śrī mākecuvara kaṇkāṇi ciṟumāyilaṅkaiyuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu śrīkā
riyam puṉakañceriyuṭaiyāṉ teṉṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 22.57 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
